actions: Delete exact duplicate files in Pictures\backup (IMG_2098_copy.txt, sunset_dup.txt)
Delete installer-extract folder Downloads\SetupTool_v3_extracted

actions: Minimal plan actions
Group Downloads files by type and purpose (e.g. move bills like electricity_bill_jan.txt, swiggy_invoice_mar.txt into Downloads\bills)
Archive old or low-value files from Downloads (old_notes_2023.txt, untitled.txt) into Downloads\archive_2023
Move photos metadata files in Pictures into a clearer subfolder structure (e.g. Pictures\2026 or Pictures\vacation)
Ensure sensitive Documents remain grouped and consider adding subfolders by document type or year
medium.reclaimable: small space from archiving and duplicates (~few MB)

actions: Medium plan actions
Create semantic sub-hierarchies in Documents (e.g. Tax, BankStatements, ID_Cards folders) with consistent naming mirroring Documents folder style
Rename Downloads files for consistent naming and date format
Organize Pictures folder into year/event based subfolders with consistent naming (e.g. 2026_BagaBeach_Sunset.txt)
Consolidate all backups and duplicates into a dedicated backup folder or remove redundant copies
Standardize Projects folder naming and add README or index files for clarity
best.reclaimable: small space from duplicates and cleanup (~few MB)

output.rationale: Drive shows good folder-level organization in Documents and Projects, but Downloads and Pictures need grouping and duplicate cleanup.

highlights.label: excellent
highlights.note: All files follow a consistent naming scheme, share the same purpose (financial records), and contain no duplicates.

highlights.label: good
highlights.note: Clear hierarchical layout (Session → README & code), consistent file naming, and no duplicate content.

actions: Delete exact duplicate files (Pictures\IMG_2098.txt & Pictures\backup\IMG_2098_copy.txt; Pictures\sunset.txt & Pictures\backup\sunset_dup.txt).
Delete the installer‑extract folder "Downloads\SetupTool_v3_extracted" and its 4 files.
✅ Perform all minimal actions.
Create a "Bills" subfolder inside Downloads and move amazon_order_4471.txt, electricity_bill_jan.txt, flipkart_2025_tv.txt, and bills\swiggy_invoice_mar.txt into it.
Create a "Misc" subfolder in Downloads for old_notes_2023.txt and untitled.txt.
Archive stale download items older than 6 months into a "Archive" folder (currently none, but structure ready).
✅ Perform all medium actions.
In Documents, split files into semantic subfolders:
• Finance/Tax – Form16_FY2025.txt
• Finance/Bank – HDFC_statement_Jan2026.txt
• Finance/Identity – PAN_card.txt
• Finance/Salary – salary_slip_april2026.txt
Rename files to a uniform pattern: <type>_<YYYY>_<MM>.txt (e.g., tax_2025_12.txt).
In Pictures, delete the backup folder after confirming the master copies, keep only the originals, and rename them to "YYYYMMDD_Description.txt" (e.g., 20260601_sunset.txt).
Create Year‑based subfolders under Pictures (e.g., 2026/) and move renamed photos accordingly.
In Projects, consolidate the two session folders under a common "EAGv3" hierarchy, rename README files to "README_Session7.md" and "README_Session8.md" for clarity.
Apply the same naming convention to all code files (e.g., flow_session7.py).
best.reclaimable: < 1 KB (duplicate removal) + any space saved by deleting the backup folder (≈10 KB).

output.rationale: The drive mixes well‑structured project and document folders with a loosely organized Downloads area and duplicated photos.

actions: Delete one copy from each duplicate group (Pictures\IMG_2098.txt ↔ Pictures\backup\IMG_2098_copy.txt, Pictures\sunset.txt ↔ Pictures\backup\sunset_dup.txt).
Delete the installer‑extract folder "Downloads\SetupTool_v3_extracted" and its 4 temporary files.
✅ Perform all minimal actions.
Create a subfolder "Downloads\Invoices" and move:
• amazon_order_4471.txt → Downloads\Invoices\Amazon\2026\amazon_order_4471.txt
• flipkart_2025_tv.txt → Downloads\Invoices\Flipkart\2025\flipkart_2025_tv.txt
• electricity_bill_jan.txt → Downloads\Invoices\Utilities\2026\electricity_bill_jan.txt
• swiggy_invoice_mar.txt (already in Downloads\bills) → Downloads\Invoices\Food\2026\swiggy_invoice_mar.txt
Create a photo date folder "Pictures\2026\06" and move IMG_20260601_165420.txt there.
Archive rarely used text files (old_notes_2023.txt, untitled.txt) into "Downloads\Archive\old_notes_2023.zip".
Remove empty "Pictures\backup" folder after duplicates are deleted.
✅ Perform all minimal and medium actions.
Restructure Documents into a semantic hierarchy:
• Documents\Financial\Tax\Form16_FY2025.txt
• Documents\Financial\Bank\HDFC_statement_Jan2026.txt
• Documents\Financial\Identity\PAN_card.txt
• Documents\Financial\Salary\salary_slip_april2026.txt
Rename all picture files to a uniform pattern "IMG_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.txt" and place them under "Pictures\YYYY\MM" (e.g., Pictures\2026\06\IMG_20260601_165420.txt).
Delete the now‑empty "Pictures\backup" folder.
Consolidate Projects sessions under a single hierarchy:
• Projects\EAGv3\Session7\README.md, code\flow.py
• Projects\EAGv3\Session8\README.md, code\flow.py
Optionally compress the archive folder created in the medium plan.
Run a final duplicate scan to verify no stray copies remain.
best.reclaimable: ≈ 2 KB (plus any compression gains from the archive, ~1 KB)

output.rationale: The drive mixes well‑structured areas (Documents, Projects) with a cluttered Downloads folder and duplicate photos; modest cleanup yields immediate space and a clear path to a fully semantic hierarchy.

highlights.label: excellent

highlights.note: Well‑structured per‑session hierarchy, consistent file types and naming.

actions: Delete one copy of each duplicate pair (Pictures\IMG_2098.txt & Pictures\backup\IMG_2098_copy.txt, Pictures\sunset.txt & Pictures\backup\sunset_dup.txt).
Delete the installer‑extract folder "Downloads\SetupTool_v3_extracted" and its 4 files.
minimal.reclaimable: ≈ 20 KB (duplicate files) + estimated 20 KB from installer folder ≈ 40 KB total

actions: Perform all minimal actions.
Create a top‑level "Bills" folder and move: amazon_order_4471.txt, flipkart_2025_tv.txt, electricity_bill_jan.txt, and bills\swiggy_invoice_mar.txt into subfolders by year (e.g., Bills/2026).
Move the photo metadata file "Downloads\IMG_20260601_165420.txt" into Pictures/2026/.
Archive rarely used files (old_notes_2023.txt, untitled.txt) into an "Archive/2026" folder.
Consolidate picture backups: move the two duplicate files from Pictures\backup into Pictures and delete the empty backup folder.
medium.reclaimable: ≈ 40 KB (same as minimal) – organization gain rather than space.

actions: Perform all medium actions.
In Documents, create semantic subfolders:
- Financial/Tax (Form16_FY2025.txt),
- Financial/Bank (HDFC_statement_Jan2026.txt),
- Personal/ID (PAN_card.txt),
- Payroll (salary_slip_april2026.txt).
Rename files for consistent pattern, e.g., "Tax_Form16_FY2025.txt".
In Downloads, restructure into clear categories:
- Receipts/Amazon/2026/amazon_order_4471.txt,
- Receipts/Flipkart/2026/flipkart_2025_tv.txt,
- Bills/Electricity/2026/electricity_bill_jan.txt,
- Bills/Swiggy/2026/swiggy_invoice_mar.txt,
- Archive/2026/old_notes_2023.txt, untitled.txt.
In Pictures, delete the now‑empty backup folder, keep only one copy of each image, and rename using a date‑first scheme (e.g., 2026-06-01_IMG_2098.txt).
Add a README at the drive root summarising the new hierarchy.
Optionally, generate a small index file listing all sensitive documents for quick reference.
best.reclaimable: ≈ 40 KB (same as minimal) – primary benefit is future maintainability.

output.rationale: Drive contains well‑organized Documents and Projects, but Downloads is a mixed dump and Pictures holds duplicate backups; four financial files are flagged as sensitive.
